Bash(node -e " const {z} = require\('./node_modules/zod'\); // 1. z.coerce.bigint\(\) edges const S = z.coerce.bigint\(\); for \(const v of [null, undefined, '', 'abc', 1.5, '1e3', '0x1', '-5', '999999999999999999999999', true, {}]\) { const r = S.safeParse\(v\); console.log\('bigint coerce', JSON.stringify\(v\), '->', r.success ? String\(r.data\) : 'FAIL:'+r.error.issues[0].code\); } // 2. datetime\(\) edges const D = z.string\(\).datetime\(\); for \(const v of ['2026-04-23T00:00:00Z', '2026-04-23T00:00:00+05:30', '2026-04-23T00:00:00.123Z', '2026-04-23T00:00Z', '2026-04-23T00:00:00', '']\) { const r = D.safeParse\(v\); console.log\('datetime', JSON.stringify\(v\), '->', r.success ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'\); } // 3. z.string\(\).date\(\) support try { const DD = z.string\(\).date\(\); for \(const v of ['2026-04-23', '2026-4-23', '20260423', 'not-a-date']\) { const r = DD.safeParse\(v\); console.log\('date', JSON.stringify\(v\), '->', r.success ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'\); } } catch \(e\) { console.log\('date\(\) NOT AVAILABLE:', e.message\); } // 4. uuid\(\) edges — v7, nil, upper const U = z.string\(\).uuid\(\); for \(const v of ['00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000', '018f3c8a-8b4c-7e12-a1b2-c3d4e5f60718', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'.toUpperCase\(\), 'not-uuid']\) { const r = U.safeParse\(v\); console.log\('uuid', v, '->', r.success ? Bash(node -e "const zpkg = require\('zod/package.json'\); console.log\('zod version:', zpkg.version\); const {z} = require\('zod'\); console.log\('date\(\) is fn:', typeof z.string\(\).date === 'function'\); console.log\('datetime offset test:', z.string\(\).datetime\(\).safeParse\('2026-04-23T00:00:00+05:30'\).success\); console.log\('datetime Z test:', z.string\(\).datetime\(\).safeParse\('2026-04-23T00:00:00Z'\).success\); console.log\('bigint empty string:', z.coerce.bigint\(\).safeParse\(''\).success, '->', String\(z.coerce.bigint\(\).safeParse\(''\).data\)\); console.log\('bigint empty array:', z.coerce.bigint\(\).safeParse\([]\).success, '->', String\(z.coerce.bigint\(\).safeParse\([]\).data\)\); console.log\('bigint 1e3:', z.coerce.bigint\(\).safeParse\('1e3'\).success\); console.log\('date feb30:', z.string\(\).date\(\).safeParse\('2026-02-30'\).success\); console.log\('globSync:', typeof require\('node:fs'\).globSync\);")
